task.title: Model publication and content-proof alignment
task.summary: Represent commits, tree SHAs, package digests, archive ledgers, PR/release text, and safe-to-push evidence as publication/content-proof layer refs in builds, graph, and gateway policy.

goal.outcome: Publication gates and graph reconciliation distinguish validation attestations from immutable content proof and block publication when proof or claim alignment is missing.
acceptance: Builds and validation reports can record working-tree digest, tree SHA, commit SHA, package digest, archive ledger, remote ref, and publication claim refs.
Graph includes publication/content-proof nodes or compact refs and flags missing proof for publication claims.
Publication validation requires immutable content proof and aligned commit/package/PR/release text according to policy.
Tests cover pre-commit validation vs publication proof distinction.
non_goals: Do not implement automatic remote push/release unless already supported by policy.

delta.desired: Publication/content-proof task closes only after fresh validation confirms immutable publication proof behavior.
delta.current: Publication proof policy is implemented, but fresh validation and any remaining publication alignment scope are pending; status reopened from auto-done evidence transition.
delta.closure: Close after validation and final review of TASK-084 acceptance criteria.
